description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find an in‑person mushroom foraging walk within about 30 miles of Manchester happening on a weekend in May, filter to options under £80 per adult with ratings of at least 4.5 stars, sort by lowest price, and book the cheapest qualifying event for 2 adults by adding it to your cart.

tasks.instruction: In the courses section, filter for online self‑paced beginner‑level herbs courses priced under $100 with at least 4 hours of content, sort by highest rating, and add the top‑rated qualifying course to your cart.

tasks.instruction: After logging into your account, search the events calendar for family‑friendly foraging events within about 10 miles of Seattle happening in July that start before 11:00 AM, and save the first three results to your Favorites or Saved Events list.

tasks.instruction: From the shop, add one digital gift voucher in USD and one physical field guide book priced under $25 to your cart, then complete checkout for both items together in a single order using example US shipping and payment details.

tasks.instruction: Browse 3‑day coastal foraging retreats in August, compare the first two results by the total number of included meals (breakfasts, lunches, dinners) and, if they tie, by lower overall price, then book the preferred retreat for one adult on an August start date and add it to your cart.
